text.title: LLM-Powered Conversational AI Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output spec.

input.description: ASR provider creds + LLM model + endpoint + TTS voice config + Safety policy (jailbreak + grounding sources) + Fallback escalation target

trace.step: Pick voice / text / hybrid; document latency budget.
Select ASR + LLM + TTS providers; pin versions.
Insert jailbreak + grounding filters; define refusal templates.
Wire JSONL audit log with user + LLM + safety + latency per turn.
Run 100 sample dialogues; verify latency p95 within budget.
